artifacts.title: Paper receipt from 2022-05-18
artifacts.excerpt:
For all the impressive performance of LLMs like 🐕/🦩, I would still be really surprised if they could reliably solve the type of challenge we suggested in our ACL2020 paper, eg a story + qs about the final state (how many fruits are now in crate 2?)

artifacts.title: Paper receipt from 2024-03-10
artifacts.excerpt: Some people imagine the future of science as LLMs peer-reviewing other LLM written papers, and that future seems pretty bleak to me. This excellent paper details the hazards of over-automating science and challenges us to re-humanize the scientific endeavor. Thoughts in 🧵1/6 https://t.co/jvso2fMLH3
